findings.detail: 6 nodes (within 3-8 range). Chain DEV→DEP→OPR→CHK→USR/ESC clearly shows both the 4-level accountability chain and the Q3 decision gate. All labels are plain language with no unexplained acronyms. Only Q3 concepts present — no visual scope creep toward 9.10/9.11. Project palette correctly applied: auto (purple) for developer/deployer, hitl (yellow thick border) for operator/decision node/escalation, done (green) for 'accountability named — safe to proceed'. Title set in frontmatter. PNG rendered clean.

stats.layout: flowchart TB (vertical chain with branch at CHK)
